# UC-17.5.12 · Forcepoint Administrator Configuration Change Audit (`forcepoint:one`)

> **Criticality:** High &middot; **Difficulty:** Intermediate &middot; **Pillar:** Security &middot; **Type:** Audit, Security &middot; **Status:** Verified

*We use network security tools to watch who accesses what, help prevent data leaks, enforce network isolation, and secure cloud and remote access.*

---

## Description

SSE consoles are high-value targets; immutable logs of admin edits support insider investigations.

## Value

Change boards correlate outages with policy publishes.

## Implementation

Install the Insights SIEM app, configure HEC inputs per product line, and align indexes (`proxy`, `email`, `dlp`, `sase`). Normalize usernames to enterprise SAMAccountName.

## SPL

```spl
index=sase sourcetype="forcepoint:one" earliest=-24h
| where match(lower(event_type),"(?i)admin|config|policy.publish")
| stats count by admin_user, object, action
| sort -count
```

## CIM SPL

```spl
| tstats `summariesonly` count
  from datamodel=Email.Email
  by Email.user, Email.action, Email.src, Email.dest span=1h
| sort - count
```

## Visualization

Timeline, table.

## Known False Positives

Spikes from new SaaS rollouts, automated workflows, sanctioned bulk uploads, or M&A integration.
